subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto Him Who hath manifested Himself of His own volition. He is, in truth, the Almighty, the Help in Peril, the Self-Subsisting. These are the Ayyám-i-Há
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان الذی اظهر نفسه کیف اراد انه لهو المقتدر المهیمن القیوم هذه ایام الهاء و
